excerpt.as_written: جليان يسوع المسيح الدي اعطاه الله ان يري عبيده ما ينبغي ان يكون سريعا
translation: The revelation of Jesus Christ which God gave him to show his servants what would happen soon…

excerpt.as_written: ات يا رب يسوع نعم الرب يسوع المسيح مع جميع القديسين والمقتنى والناسح والسامع امين
translation: Come, Lord Jesus, yes, Jesus Christ, with all the saints, possessors, the scribe, and the hearer. Amen

note: There are section divisions within the text, but these appear to have been added after the text was written. The sections are numbered from three to seven (e.g. ff. 3r-8v), after which, there are blank portions on later folia, perhaps where another scribe was meant to add in the section numbers.

work_wit.alt_title: Pseudo-Dionysius' De divinis nominibus, ch. four (excerpt)

excerpt.as_written: قد يجوز ان يقول الانسان ان الخيّر الصالح اذا كان معشوقاً ماثوراً محبوباً
translation: It is possible that one might say that the beautiful good is longed for, preferred, and loved…

excerpt.as_written: وانه ماثور معشوق محبوب وغير ذلك مما أوضحه فيما تقدم القول الصادق  ولربنا التسبحة الي دهد الادهار امين
translation: …and that which is longed for, preferred, and loved and the other things that were explained previously in this genuine treatise, and to our Lord be the glory to the age of ages. Amen

note: This text is an excerpt from Pseudo-Dionysius' De divinis nominibus, chapter four (CPG 6602)

excerpt.as_written: لذيونيسَيوس الاروباجيتس اسقف ايثنا الي تيموثاوسَ الاسقف عن رىاسَه الكهنوت السَماييه
translation: By Dionysius the Areopagite, bishop of Athens, to Timothy the bishop on the leadership of the heavenly priesthood…

excerpt.as_written: وكان غير خاير ولا عاذل عن تركيبه والسبح لله دائما ابدا
translation: …and he has not departed nor is he excused from this composition. Praise to God forever and always

contents.label: Index and summary of the fifteen chapters, ff. 79r-80v

note: This text contains rubrics.  A rubric for Chapter Fifteen is lacking.

excerpt.as_written: لابينا البار مكسمس المعترف مقدمه كلامه في تفسيره الافعال المنظورة اليها في الكنيسه المتقدسه على جهه سريه
translation: Preface of the treatise by our righteous father, Maximus the Confessor, on the interpretation of the visible deeds in the holy church on the sacramental side

excerpt.as_written: عند المسيح الاهنا العظيم وحده مخلصنا ومنقد الدي له المجد والعز والاكرام والجلال والاعظام الا مع ابيه والروح القدس الى اباد الدهور والسبح لله دايما ابدا
translation: With Christ, our great God alone, our Savior and Deliverer to Whom is the glory, honor, esteem, dignity, and majesty with the Father and Holy Spirit to the end of the ages. And glory to God forever and ever

note: There are several sections throughout, some with rubrics and others without. See, for instance, f. 158r (without rubric), 165v (with rubric), etc.
